title: Mission Control
subtitle: AI Operating System
description: Give your AI team a goal. They plan, execute, verify, and ship — autonomously.

empty.title: No Repository Selected
empty.description: Select an analysis from History or analyze a new repository to start a mission. Mission Control binds to the active analysis — just like AI Chat and AI Report.

form.title: Define Your Mission
form.description: Describe what you want your AI team to accomplish. They'll plan, execute, verify, and ship.
form.noProviders: No enabled providers — workflow will use built-in fallbacks. Add one in Providers.
form.iterationsHint: Each iteration = one observe → think → act → verify → reflect cycle. The Executive may stop earlier if confidence is high.
form.disclaimer: Missions execute locally — your code never leaves your machine.
